senses.definition: a sexual relationship between two people in which at least one of them is already committed to someone else

examples.x: She was heartbroken when she discovered her husband was having an affair with a colleague.
The scandalous affair between the politician and his assistant made headlines across the country.
He ended the affair, realizing the damage it was causing to his marriage and family.
The affair was kept secret for years until someone accidentally stumbled upon their private messages.
She confided in her best friend about the affair, seeking advice on how to handle the situation.

senses.definition: a relationship formed between people or groups based on mutual experiences, ideas, feelings, etc.
all the people living in a house together, considered as a social unit

examples.x: The entire household gathered in the living room to discuss the upcoming family vacation.
Managing a household with three kids and two pets can be quite challenging.
The new neighbors introduced their household to everyone on the street during a welcome party.
She runs a busy household, balancing her job and taking care of her elderly parents.
The household was full of laughter and activity during the holiday season.

senses.definition: the legal act of ending a marriage

examples.x: After years of marital conflict, they decided to pursue a divorce and go their separate ways.
The couple sought counseling in an attempt to save their marriage, but ultimately, they ended up filing for divorce.
She felt a sense of relief after finalizing her divorce

senses.definition: to legally end a marriage

examples.x: After years of struggling, they decided to divorce and pursue separate lives.
The couple sought counseling, but ultimately, they had to face the difficult decision to divorce.
The decision to divorce is personal, and individuals may choose it for various reasons, seeking a fresh start.
Last year, they successfully divorced and started anew.
The high-profile couple divorced after a long legal battle.

senses.definition: the direct line of descent from a particular person

examples.x: Researchers were able to trace the royal lineage back many generations to find a common ancestor among all the early kings.
The family took great pride in their lineage, which could be traced directly back to the original settlers who founded the town.

senses.definition: a blood relative who lived a long time ago, usually before one's grandparents

examples.x: She discovered that one of her ancestors had fought in the Civil War.
They visited the old cemetery where many of their ancestors were buried.
The family tree traced their ancestors back to the 1700s in Europe.
He was proud to learn that his ancestor had been a renowned artist.
They shared stories about their ancestors, passing down family history to the younger generation.

senses.definition: the person one used to be married to or have a relationship with

examples.x: My ex and I are on good terms and remain friends after our breakup.
She ran into her ex at the grocery store, and they exchanged awkward pleasantries.
He decided to unfollow his ex on social media to help him move on from the relationship.
Her ex was mentioned in the news article about the charity event they attended together last year.
Despite being divorced, they both attended their daughter's graduation, showing that they could still be amicable exes.

senses.definition: a large family group consisting of parents and children that might also include grandparents, aunts, or uncles

examples.x: Their extended family reunions are always a big event, with over fifty relatives attending.
She grew up in a house where her extended family lived together, creating a strong support system.
During the holidays, the extended family gathers at the grandparents' house for a big feast.
His extended family includes relatives from different parts of the world, making their gatherings very diverse.
The extended family helped raise the children, providing additional care and guidance.

senses.definition: one's parents or family members in general

examples.x: She's planning to visit her folks over the weekend to catch up and spend some quality time.
His folks always make a special dinner whenever he comes home from college.
I’m meeting my folks for brunch today, so I can’t stay out too late tonight.
Her folks were very supportive when she decided to pursue her dream career.
Every summer, he goes camping with his folks, continuing a beloved family tradition.

senses.definition: a person who takes someone else's child and raises them without legally becoming their parent

examples.x: She became a foster parent to provide a loving home for children in need.
The foster parent attended special training sessions to better care for the child.
As a foster parent, he welcomed three siblings into his home, ensuring they stayed together.
The foster parent worked closely with social workers to support the child's transition.
She found great joy and fulfillment in her role as a foster parent, helping children thrive.

senses.definition: either of two children or animals born from the same mother at the same time who are very similar in appearance

examples.x: People often confuse her with her identical twin because they look so alike.
The identical twins dressed in matching outfits for their birthday party.
Despite being identical twins, they have very different personalities and interests.
An interesting fact about identical twins is that they share the same DNA.
Growing up, the identical twins enjoyed playing pranks on their friends by switching places.

senses.definition: a person who is related to someone by marriage

examples.x: His in-laws are visiting for the holidays.
They invited all their in-laws to the wedding.
Her in-law helped them move into their new house.
She enjoys spending time with her in-laws on weekends.
She introduced her in-laws to her parents.

senses.definition: one's brother or sister

examples.x: She has a close relationship with her sibling and talks to her every day.
Growing up, he often competed with his sibling in various sports and games.
They decided to start a business together, combining their sibling strengths and talents.
She relied on her sibling for advice and support during difficult times.
The siblings reunited for their parents' anniversary, reminiscing about their childhood.

senses.definition: the son of one's stepfather or stepmother from a previous relationship

examples.x: My stepbrother and I get along well, even though we come from different families.
After our parents got married, I gained a stepbrother who is now like a brother to me.
My stepbrother and I share a room since our families blended together.
Despite some initial awkwardness, my stepbrother quickly became an important part of my life.
It was strange at first to have a stepbrother, but now I can't imagine my life without him.

senses.definition: a child of one's husband or wife from a former marriage

examples.x: He treated his stepchild with the same love and care as his biological children.
She found it challenging to connect with her stepchild initially, but they gradually built a strong bond.
The stepchild was excited to move into a new home and start at a new school.
They planned a special family vacation to help their stepchild feel more included.
The counselor provided advice on how to navigate the dynamics of having a stepchild.

senses.definition: the daughter of one's spouse from a past relationship

examples.x: She bought a beautiful necklace as a birthday gift for her stepdaughter.
He took his stepdaughter to her first baseball game, creating a cherished memory.
The stepdaughter and her stepmother enjoyed spending weekends baking together.
Despite the initial difficulties, her stepdaughter eventually came to accept her as part of the family.
He proudly attended his stepdaughter's graduation, cheering her on from the audience.

senses.definition: the man that is married to one's parent but is not one's biological father

examples.x: Her stepfather taught her how to drive, patiently guiding her through each lesson.
The stepfather and his stepson bonded over their shared love of fishing.
She invited her stepfather to walk her down the aisle at her wedding.
He appreciated the way his stepfather always supported him and offered sound advice.
The stepfather attended every school event, showing his unwavering support for his stepchildren.

senses.definition: the woman that is married to one's parent but is not one's biological mother

examples.x: She got along well with her stepmother.
His stepmother helped him with his homework.
The story is about a kind stepmother who takes care of her stepchildren.
They moved to a new house after their father married their stepmother.
The movie portrayed the stepmother as a caring and loving figure.

senses.definition: the daughter of one's stepfather or stepmother from a previous relationship

examples.x: She and her stepsister became best friends, sharing secrets and dreams.
The stepsister duo worked together on their school project, complementing each other's strengths.
Despite their differences, the stepsisters found common ground and built a strong relationship.
She was excited to have a stepsister to confide in and share her interests with.
The stepsisters planned a surprise birthday party for their father, working together to make it special.

senses.definition: the son of one's spouse from a past relationship

examples.x: His stepson quickly adjusted to the new family dynamic and felt right at home.
The stepson admired his stepfather for his dedication and support.
They celebrated the stepson's achievements with a big family dinner.

senses.definition: the state in which a couple decide to live apart while they are still legally married

examples.x: The couple's separation agreement outlined the terms for child custody and financial support during their time apart.
She found solace in her own space during the separation period, taking time to focus on personal growth and reflection.
The emotional toll of the separation weighed heavily on both parties, despite their mutual agreement to part ways for the time being.

senses.definition: the act or fact of taking someone's child and growing them up, which has been approved by law

examples.x: The couple completed the adoption process and welcomed their new daughter into their home.
They attended an adoption workshop to better understand the responsibilities and legalities involved.
The adoption was finalized after months of paperwork and home visits from social workers.
The adoption agency matched the child with a family who could provide a nurturing environment.

senses.definition: showing a level of love or care that one would only expect a brother to have

examples.x: He offered his brotherly advice when she was facing a difficult decision.
He gave her a brotherly hug to reassure her before the big game.
The two friends shared a brotherly bond forged through years of shared experiences.
His brotherly instinct kicked in when he saw his younger sibling struggling with the heavy load, and he rushed to help.

senses.definition: (of a group of people) having a strong friendly relationship with shared interests

examples.x: The residents of the small town were known for their close-knit community, always ready to lend a helping hand to their neighbors.
Growing up in a close-knit family meant that there was always someone to turn to for advice or support.
Despite moving to a new city, she quickly found a close-knit group of friends who made her feel right at home.
The close-knit neighborhood association organized regular events and gatherings to strengthen the sense of community among its members.
They have a close-knit relationship built on trust and shared experiences.

senses.definition: to take someone's child into one's family and become their legal parent

examples.x: The couple decided to adopt a child to expand their family and share their love.
After years of waiting, they finally had the opportunity to adopt a newborn baby.
Many couples choose to adopt children from different cultural backgrounds, promoting diversity within families.
Single individuals can also adopt and provide a stable and loving home for a child in need.
Adopting a child involves a lifelong commitment to providing care, guidance, and support as a legal parent.

senses.definition: to have a secret romantic or sexual relationship with someone other than one's own partner

examples.x: She discovered that her partner had cheated on her with a co-worker.
The rumors about him cheating on his wife turned out to be true.
She was devastated when she found out her spouse had cheated on her during their vacation.
The couple sought counseling after he admitted to cheating on multiple occasions.
Despite his apologies, the damage was done when he cheated on his boyfriend.

senses.definition: to receive money, property, etc. from someone who has passed away

examples.x: After her grandmother's passing, she inherited a beautiful antique necklace.
He was surprised to inherit a vast collection of rare books from his uncle.
The family home was inherited by the youngest son after the parents' death.
She decided to donate a portion of the money she inherited to a charitable cause.
The business was smoothly transitioned to the next generation as the siblings inherited equal shares.

senses.definition: to remain loyal to or supportive of someone, particularly during a hard time
to look or act like an older member of the family, especially one's parents

examples.x: The little girl strongly takes after her mother.
The baby takes after his father with those adorable dimples.
Both sisters take after their mother in terms of kindness.
The family members take after each other in their distinctive smiles.
The teenager takes after his older brother in fashion sense.

senses.definition: to sing softly in order to help someone fall asleep
having a near blood relationship or strong genetic connection

examples.x: In evolutionary biology, species that have a recent common ancestor are considered closely related.
Lions and tigers are closely related species, both belonging to the genus Panthera.
In botany, tomatoes and potatoes are closely related plants, both part of the nightshade family.
